title: Create AI feature for generating financial reports
description: Use the financial reports document to understand key fundamentals needed to generate a AI application that can autonomously create financial reports

nodes.title: Financial Reports Fundamentals
nodes.description: Learn key components of financial reports including balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements. Understand the structure and purpose of each report type.

nodes.title: OpenAI API Basics
nodes.description: Understand OpenAI API authentication, endpoints, and how to make basic requests. Learn about models, tokens, and API rate limits.

nodes.title: FastAPI Fundamentals
nodes.description: Learn FastAPI framework basics including routing, request/response handling, and creating REST endpoints. Understand async/await patterns.

nodes.title: Prompt Engineering for Finance
nodes.description: Master crafting effective prompts for financial data analysis. Learn how to structure prompts to generate accurate, formatted financial reports.

nodes.title: FastAPI and OpenAI Integration
nodes.description: Integrate OpenAI API calls into FastAPI endpoints. Handle streaming responses, error management, and request validation.

nodes.title: Financial Data Parsing and Validation
nodes.description: Learn to parse financial data inputs, validate accuracy, and format data for AI consumption. Understand data transformation for report generation.

nodes.title: AI Report Generation Pipeline
nodes.description: Build an end-to-end pipeline that accepts financial data, generates reports via AI, and returns formatted output. Integrate data parsing with API calls.

nodes.title: Error Handling and Testing
nodes.description: Implement robust error handling for API failures, invalid inputs, and edge cases. Write unit and integration tests for the report generation system.

nodes.title: Performance and Cost Optimization
nodes.description: Optimize API calls, implement caching, batch processing, and cost management strategies. Monitor token usage and response times.
